build_system: pnpm + turbo; per-package scripts: tsc for build, vitest for test
test_framework: vitest with describe/it/expect, mock providers for testing
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: pnpm --filter @quant/device-control typecheck. 2. Run tests: pnpm --filter @quant/device-control test. 3. Ensure no new TS errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - no restrictions. Node.js v22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR, conventional commits, all gates pass, emergency access NEVER disabled (Section 0 safety rule)
key_patterns: Each feature module in src/<module>/ with types.ts, index.ts exports. Tests in src/__tests__/<name>.test.ts. Capability providers implement CapabilityProvider interface. Voice intents use DeviceIntent type. Contacts use UnifiedContact type. Exports aggregated in src/index.ts.
directory_structure: packages/device-control/src/ contains: agents/, audit/, capabilities/, contacts/, permissions/, providers/, voice/, __tests__/, index.ts, registry.ts. New phone-free module will live in src/phone-free/
